ingredients.name: Suwa Shrine
ingredients.entityContext: The 副川諏訪神社 in Shinshiro appears in Episode 7, where Lemon runs through the area at night and Nukumizu goes searching for her — a pivotal moment that reveals more about Lemon's circumstances and her complicated relationship with the literature club.

ingredients.name: Maehata Station
ingredients.address: １２ mビル, 2 Chome-12 Maebatacho, Tajimi, Gifu 507-0042, Japan

ingredients.name: Toyohashi City Machinaka Library
ingredients.localName: 豊橋市まちなか図書館
ingredients.address: emCAMPUS EAST, 2F・3F, 2 Chome-81 Ekimae Odori, Toyohashi, Aichi 440-0888, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Nukumizu and Komari stop by the Machinaka Library in Episode 9 to return reference books, and spot Tamaki and Tsukino on an unmistakable date — the moment Komari realizes she is watching her own losing-heroine situation play out in real time.

ingredients.name: Seibunkan Toyohashi Main Store
ingredients.localName: 精文館書店 豊橋本店
ingredients.entityContext: The landmark Seibunkan bookstore on Hirokoji-dori is a recurring meeting spot: Nukumizu encounters Yakishio browsing light novels in sportswear after her morning jog, and later runs into Komari there while both are researching trends for their literary draft.

ingredients.name: Near the Yojosha
ingredients.address: Japan, 〒158-0081 Tokyo, Setagaya City, Fukasawa, 5 Chome−3−13

ingredients.name: Ferris Wheel
ingredients.address: 1 Chome-1-10 Kaigandori, Minato Ward, Osaka, 552-0022, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The Nonhoi Park ferris wheel is the centerpiece of the finale (Episode 12, titled 'The Ferris Wheel Kiss Problem'): Yanami and Nukumizu share a charged, ambiguous ride together, followed by Lemon and Komari joining for a second round in a scene that leaves their relationships deliberately unresolved.

ingredients.name: Nonhoi Park Observation Tower
ingredients.localName: のんほいパーク展望塔
ingredients.entityContext: Nonhoi Park's observation tower and amusement grounds serve as the backdrop for the entire Episode 12 finale outing, with the tower visible as the gang moves between attractions during the pivotal theme-park date that closes the season.

ingredients.name: Toyohashi Station
ingredients.entityContext: Toyohashi Station is the central hub of the anime's setting and appears across multiple episodes; it is where characters arrive, depart, and cross paths — the east exit plaza features prominently and became a real-world collaboration site with Central Japan Railway during the broadcast.

ingredients.name: Toyohashi Police Station Toyohashi Ekimae Police Box
ingredients.localName: 豊橋警察署 豊橋駅前交番
ingredients.address: 1 Chome-131 Ekimae Odori, Toyohashi, Aichi 440-0888, Japan

ingredients.name: Near the Toyohashi City Asahi School District Civic Hall
ingredients.localName: 豊橋市 旭校区市民館
ingredients.type: コミュニティ センター
categories: コミュニティ センター
ingredients.address: Japan, 〒440-0057 Aichi, Toyohashi, Asahimachi, Asahi−535-2 旭校区市民館

ingredients.name: Toyohashi Museum of Natural History
ingredients.entityContext: The Toyohashi Museum of Natural History, located within the Nonhoi Park complex, appears in the series as part of the park setting used during the Episode 12 amusement-park visit.

ingredients.name: Naraze river crossing
ingredients.entityContext: This submersible bridge (沈下橋) over the Naraze River in Shinshiro appears in Episode 6 as the literature club makes their way toward Lemon's family home — the remote rural setting underscores how far Lemon has retreated from her school life.

ingredients.name: Roadside Station "Michi-no-Eki" Toyohashi
ingredients.type: サービスエリア / パーキング エリア
categories: サービスエリア / パーキング エリア
ingredients.entityContext: The Michi-no-Eki Toyohashi roadside station appears in the anime as a recognizable waypoint on routes into the city, representing the everyday Toyohashi landscape the characters inhabit.

ingredients.name: Roadside Station "Michi-no-Eki" Mokkulu Shinshiro
ingredients.localName: 道の駅 もっくる新城
ingredients.type: サービスエリア / パーキング エリア
categories: サービスエリア / パーキング エリア
ingredients.address: 五反田-329-7 Yatsukaho, Shinshiro, Aichi 441-1318, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Michi-no-Eki Mokkuru Shinshiro appears in Episode 6 when the literature club stops here on their way to find Lemon — Yanami's memorable 'I want carbohydrates' moment takes place here, and the rest stop displayed character flags during the broadcast.

ingredients.name: Yoshidaju Safety Akihayama Nightlight
ingredients.localName: 吉田中安全秋葉山常夜燈
ingredients.entityContext: This historic stone lantern on Asahihonmachi appears in Episode 6 as the spot where Asagumo calls Nukumizu out for a private conversation — a quietly atmospheric Toyohashi landmark that underscores the show's grounded sense of place.

ingredients.name: Ekimae Station
ingredients.address: 中央街-1-1 博多駅, Hakata Ward, Fukuoka, 812-0012, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The Toyohashi tram stop at the station front (駅前) marks the start of the city's iconic tram line, which the characters use to travel between school and the city center throughout the series.

ingredients.name: East Exit Station Square Circle Plaza
ingredients.localName: 東口駅前広場 サークルプラザ
ingredients.entityContext: The east exit plaza in front of Toyohashi Station appears in several episodes as a recurring gathering and departure point for the main cast, and hosted official anime character boards during the series' collaboration with the city.

ingredients.name: Mogumogu Square
ingredients.entityContext: Mogumogu Square in Nonhoi Park (the zoo section) is part of the park complex that hosts the Episode 12 finale group outing.

ingredients.name: Yamasachikuwa Nishiekiten
ingredients.localName: ヤマサちくわ 西駅店

ingredients.name: Toyohashi City Central Library
ingredients.entityContext: The Central Library in Toyohashi appears in Episode 9 alongside the Machinaka Library, serving as one of the settings where Nukumizu and Komari's research activities — and unintended romantic observations — take place.

ingredients.name: Ekimae-odori Station
ingredients.entityContext: This tram stop on Ekimae-odori appears in the series as the characters navigate Toyohashi's distinctive streetcar network between the station district and the shopping arcade area.

ingredients.name: Higashi Hachicho Station
ingredients.entityContext: The Higashihachimachi tram intersection and stop appears in Episode 6, where Asagumo calls out to Nukumizu for a conversation — one of several tram-side encounters the show uses to frame its slice-of-life character beats.

ingredients.name: Toyohashi City Audiovisual Education Center
ingredients.localName: 豊橋市視聴覚教育センター
ingredients.entityContext: The Audiovisual Education Center, also within the Nonhoi Park grounds, appears in the finale episode alongside the other park facilities during the cast's day out.

ingredients.name: Roasting Laboratory
ingredients.address: Japan, 〒440-0888 Aichi, Toyohashi, Ekimae Odori, 1 Chome−114

ingredients.name: Nohoi Park Large Flower Bed
ingredients.localName: のんほいパーク 大花壇
ingredients.entityContext: The flower bed area at Nonhoi Park appears during the Episode 12 finale visit, adding a scenic backdrop to the group's amusement-park day that anchors the season's climactic character moments.

ingredients.name: Shiroya Seaside Park
ingredients.entityContext: Shirotani Seaside Park in Tahara is the beach where the literature club holds their summer training camp in Episodes 3–4 — the swimsuit episode set here is one of the series' most fan-discussed outings.

ingredients.name: Kushikatsu Tanaka Toyohashi
ingredients.localName: 串カツ田中 豊橋店

ingredients.name: Bon Senga
ingredients.localName: パン 生菓子 ボン.千賀
ingredients.address: 1 Chome-２８-28 Ekimae Odori, Toyohashi, Aichi 440-0888, Japan

ingredients.name: The Legend of Vulcan
ingredients.type: 子供のアミューズメント センター
categories: 子供のアミューズメント センター
ingredients.entityContext: The Vulcan Legend ride at Nonhoi Park's amusement area is one of the attractions visited by the cast during their Episode 12 theme-park outing.

ingredients.name: Uno Uno
ingredients.localName: カフェ ウーノ・ウーノ

ingredients.name: Miyako
ingredients.address: 9-1 Okazaki Seishojicho, Sakyo Ward, Kyoto, 606-8343, Japan

ingredients.name: Gusto Toyohashihashira store
ingredients.localName: ガスト 豊橋橋良店
ingredients.type: ファミリー レストラン
categories: ファミリー レストラン
ingredients.entityContext: The Gusto family restaurant near Toyohashi appears as a gathering spot for the cast — the series uses it as one of several everyday Toyohashi dining locations where the characters meet to decompress and talk.

ingredients.name: Nonhoi Park East Gate
ingredients.localName: のんほいパーク 東門

ingredients.name: Toyohashi City Underground Resources Center
ingredients.entityContext: In Episode 6, the literature club visits the Toyohashi City Underground Resources Center (地下資源館) as a research outing, one of the more unusual field-trip locations the club uses to fill their activities calendar.

ingredients.name: Bell Mart Kiosk Toyohashi Shinkansen Exit
ingredients.localName: ベルマートキヨスク豊橋幹線口
ingredients.address: Japan, 〒440-0075 Aichi, Toyohashi, Hanadacho, Nishijuku−23−3 JR豊橋駅構内, 新幹線改札口脇

ingredients.name: GINYA Toyohashiten
ingredients.type: ファッション アクセサリー店
categories: ファッション アクセサリー店
ingredients.address: Japan, 〒440-0881 Aichi, Toyohashi, Hirokoji, 1 Chome−36 一番ビル 1F

ingredients.name: Greenhouse
ingredients.localName: 温室 / 植物園トロピカル館

ingredients.name: Ehima yagai center-mae
ingredients.localName: 江比間野外センター前
ingredients.entityContext: The Ebima Outdoor Activity Center in Tahara is where the literature club stays overnight during their summer training camp arc (Episodes 3–4), forming the backdrop for several character-bonding scenes.

ingredients.name: Hon-Nagashino Station
ingredients.entityContext: Hon-Nagashino Station on the JR Iida Line in Shinshiro appears as part of the rural Shinshiro arc — fans visiting Lemon's countryside locations pass through this historic station gateway.

ingredients.name: Coffee and Canelé
ingredients.type: コーヒーショップ・喫茶店
categories: コーヒーショップ・喫茶店
ingredients.address: １１６, 1 Chome-114 Ekimae Odori, Toyohashi, Aichi 440-0888, Japan
